summary: Iteration 170: Cancelled Participants Attendance Sheets Bug Fix - All tests PASS. The fix correctly prevents attendance sheets from being created/shown when all participants have cancelled. Backend: (1) TERMINAL_PARTICIPANT_STATUSES frozenset contains exactly {cancelled_by_participant, declined, guarantee_released}, (2) initialize_declarative_phase filters out terminal targets and sets phase='not_needed' when 0 sheets created, (3) Self-declaration alone doesn't generate sheets, (4) GET /api/attendance-sheets/pending retroactively filters sheets with all terminal non-self targets. Frontend: /presences page loads correctly, displays sheets when present, and has proper empty state handling.

backend.test_all_participants_terminal_no_sheets: PASS - When all participants in manual_review have terminal status, 0 sheets created, phase = not_needed
backend.test_at_least_one_active_participant_she: PASS - When at least one participant is active, sheets created normally, phase = collecting
backend.test_self_declaration_alone_no_sheet: PASS - Self-declaration alone (no relevant non-self targets) does NOT generate a sheet
backend.test_guarantee_released_is_terminal: PASS - guarantee_released status is treated as terminal
backend.test_pending_excludes_sheets_with_all_te: PASS - GET /pending excludes sheets where all non-self targets are terminal
backend.test_pending_includes_sheets_with_active: PASS - GET /pending includes sheets with at least one active non-self target
backend.test_pending_excludes_self_declaration_o: PASS - GET /pending excludes sheets with only self-declarations
backend.test_mixed_terminal_and_active_only_acti: PASS - Mixed scenario: only active participants appear as targets

frontend.presences_pending_count_badge: PASS - '3 a remplir' badge displayed when sheets exist
frontend.presences_sheet_cards: PASS - Sheet cards displayed with title, date, location, participants count, deadline
frontend.presences_empty_state_element: PASS - data-testid='presences-empty' element exists for empty state handling

critical_code_review_comments: declarative_service.py L27-29: TERMINAL_PARTICIPANT_STATUSES correctly defined as frozenset with 3 statuses
declarative_service.py L109-115: Terminal target filtering correctly implemented - checks participant status before adding to targets
declarative_service.py L126: Self-declaration only added if 'targets' list is non-empty (has relevant non-self targets)
declarative_service.py L151-158: Guard for 0 sheets created correctly sets phase to 'not_needed'
declarative_routes.py L59-80: Retroactive filtering correctly excludes sheets with all terminal non-self targets
PresencesPage.js L56-60: Empty state correctly handled with data-testid='presences-empty'
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during backend tests (prefixed with TEST_ITER170_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for cancelled participants attendance sheets fully tested and working. Key implementation points: (1) TERMINAL_PARTICIPANT_STATUSES frozenset at L27-29 in declarative_service.py, (2) Prevention logic in initialize_declarative_phase at L109-158, (3) Retroactive filtering in GET /pending at L59-80 in declarative_routes.py. The fix ensures that when all participants have cancelled (status in {cancelled_by_participant, declined, guarantee_released}), no attendance sheet is created or shown to the organizer.
